tiny-servant.canonicalEvidence: As a bonus action, you can mentally command the creature if it is within 120 feet of you.
tiny-servant.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no typed command action.
tiny-servant.issue: Tiny Servant uses a recurring bonus action to command one or multiple servants.
tiny-servant.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon command action fields including multi-servant same-command rule.
tiny-servant.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledSummon command data for bonus action, any/all controlled servants, same command.

tiny-servant.canonicalEvidence: One Tiny, nonmagical object that is not attached to another object or a surface and is not being carried by another creature.
tiny-servant.structuredState: Valid Targets: object; no Tiny/nonmagical/unattached/not-carried filters.
tiny-servant.jsonState: Runtime validTargets objects but lacks object filters.
tiny-servant.issue: Tiny Servant target eligibility is much narrower than generic object.
tiny-servant.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object size, magical state, attached, surface-attached, and carried filters.
tiny-servant.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectFilter size Tiny, nonmagical true, notAttached true, notCarried true.

tiny-servant.canonicalEvidence: See Tiny Servant for its statistics.
tiny-servant.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no stat block reference.
tiny-servant.issue: This is not a vision/light/sound mechanic; the real issue is a missing summoned creature stat-block reference.
tiny-servant.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon statBlock Tiny Servant.

tiny-servant.canonicalEvidence: The target animates and sprouts little arms and legs, becoming a creature under your control. You decide what action it will take and where it will move, or issue a simple general command. If you issue no commands, it defends itself. Once given an order, it follows that order until complete.
tiny-servant.structuredState: Effect Type: SUMMON; no animated-object creature/stat/control behavior fields.
tiny-servant.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
tiny-servant.issue: Tiny Servant transforms an object into a controlled creature with command/default behavior, but runtime does not type the summon.
tiny-servant.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated object summon fields for stat block, control, command behavior, default defend behavior, and persistent order.
tiny-servant.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMON/animatedObject data with Tiny Servant stats and command behavior.

tiny-servant.canonicalEvidence: When the creature drops to 0 hit points, it reverts to its original form, and any remaining damage carries over to that form.
tiny-servant.structuredState: No HP zero reversion or damage carryover fields.
tiny-servant.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no object/creature lifecycle data.
tiny-servant.issue: Tiny Servant has a 0 HP reversion with excess damage carryover to the original object.
tiny-servant.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated object lifecycle and damage carryover fields.
tiny-servant.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lifecycle revertsAt0Hp and carryoverDamageToOriginalObject.

tiny-servant.canonicalEvidence: Until the spell ends or the creature drops to 0 hit points.
tiny-servant.structuredState: No controlled creature 0 HP ending fields.
tiny-servant.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no conditional ending data.
tiny-servant.issue: The servant form ends when the creature drops to 0 HP as well as when the spell ends.
tiny-servant.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled summon 0 HP ending fields.
tiny-servant.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding for servant drops to 0 HP and spell ends.
tiny-servant.closedReason: Reused the existing created_entity_drops_to_0_hp conditional-ending trigger, recorded it in the structured spell fields, and mapped it to the runtime utility effect with effect scope for the animated servant form ending.

tiny-servant.canonicalEvidence: When cast using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, you can animate two additional objects for each slot level above 3rd.
tiny-servant.structuredState: Scaling Rule 1 records special_text target/object scaling.
tiny-servant.jsonState: Runtime targeting maxTargets 1 and has no target scaling.
tiny-servant.issue: Higher slots animate additional objects, but runtime has no target-count scaling.
tiny-servant.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetScaling +2 objects per slot above 3.
tiny-servant.closedReason: Closed by reusing existing scalable targeting.maxTargets: Tiny Servant now records a multi-object target count with slot-level thresholds from 1 object at slot 3 to +2 additional objects per slot level above 3, and its structured markdown points Scaling Rule 1 at targeting.maxTargets.
